titleStmt.title: SII 11.149: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 149. (B.K. No. 190 of 1926-27.) NARĒGAL, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A STONE STANDING INSIDE A RUINED WELL CALLED HIRĒBHĀVI.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and introduces his subordinate Mahāpradhāna, Bāṇasavergaḍe, Daṇḍanāyaka Anantapāḷayya as the governor of Beḷvala Three-hundred and Purigeṟe Three-hundred provinces. It states that Mārasiṅga Gāvuṇḍa, son of Mācha-Gāvuṇḍa and grandson of Dēva-Gāvuṇḍa of Nareyaṅgal, who belonged to the Murttaga family, made a gift of land and oil-mill for the benefit of the temple of Kalidēvasvāmin of Bāviyamaṭha into the hands of the Sixteen, the Eighteen and the Pañchamaṭhasthāna.

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 25, Vikrama, Mārgaśira, puṇṇami, Sunday, lunar eclipse. The details regularly correspond to Sunday, 18th November, A.D. 1100, on which day there occurred a lunar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāruvē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁ
bhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēva vijeyarājyamutta
rōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire .
śrīrājadhāni kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōda
diṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamiralu tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcama
hāśabdamahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ vi
budhavaradāyakaṁ sujanaprasannaṁ nuḍidumattenna gōtrapavi
tra tureyarēvanta vairikritāṁta sāhasōttuṁga naiyyanasiṁgaṁ nāmā
di samasta praśastisahita śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ bāṇasaverggaḍe daṇḍanāya
ka nanantapāḷayyaṁgaḷu beḷvala munnūṟu purigeṟe mūnūruma
nāḷuttamiralu . kanda . dhareyo riya vadanakkire no le
seva beḷvalaṁ tanniṭiḷāntarada tiḷakada va nareyaṁgalpuravaraṁ ka
raṁ sūgayisuguṁ . vacana . Ā puri ḍuṁbaḷadoḷage baḍagaṇabhāga
do ḷanēkaprakhyātapuṇyapuruṣaṁ karamuditōditamāguttaṁbada murttagavamśadoḷ sa
mastapraśastisamētanuṁ vinūtanuṁ vimaḷakīrttiyuṁ bhadramūrtti
yu mappa śrīmaddēvagāvuṇḍani tannaṁdanaṁ prabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśakti
trayasamanvitanu makhiḷaguṇānvitanu mappa māca
gāvuṇḍaniṁda . kaṁda . Ene negaṟdā mācagāvuṇḍana taneyaṁ mārasiṁha
gāvuṇḍaṁ kīrttinidhāna nakhiḷaguṇanidhi vinayāṁbudhi sujanava
tsaḷaṁ kuḷatiḷakaṁ . murttagakuḷābjamitraṁ murttagavaṁśāṁburāsi
varddhitacaṁdraṁ murttagadharānvayāṁbaramārttaṇḍaṁ mārasiṁgagāvuṇḍa
budhaṁ . vacana . Eṁba pogarttegaṁ negarttegaṁ neleyāgi ninda mārasiṁgagāvu
ṇḍa śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 25 neya vikrama saṁvatsarada
mārggaśirada puṇnami yādityavāraṁ sōmagrahaṇaṁ viśēṣapuṇya
dinadaṁdu bāviyamaṭheda śrī kalidēvasvāmidēvara Aṁga
bhōgakke tanna baḷada mūḍaṇa poladoḷ kukkanūra baṭṭeyiṁ baḍagalaḍa
vūra geyi baṭṭeyiṁ teṁka kuḷḷiya viṭṭaṁ mūḍa liṁgamuṁ kavile
yuṁ tapōdhanaruṁ berasu māḍida nālkuṁ gōṁṭina taḍigallaguḍḍeye mēre
yāga laruvaṇa 1 māge biṭṭa bhūmi mattarirppattanālkuma nalliya padi
naṟuvaruṁ padineṇbaruṁ paṁcamaṭasthānamuṁ mūṟu modalu mirddācaṁ
drārkasthāyivara vā dharmmama niṁbāgire pratipālisuvar mattaṁ
mārasiṁgagāvuṇḍaṁ dēvargge biṭṭa nelaseṇa teṁkaṇa bhāgada mēreyiṁ baḍaga ka
nnēśvaradiṁ mūḍalaṁgaḍivaneyiṁ teṁka hulumaramuṁ paḍuvalintī nelanaṁ
biṭṭar . mattavāyaṁ dēvargge naṁdādīvigege māneṇṇege biṭṭa gāṇa 1 mattavā
yaṁ dēvargge biṭṭa tōṭaṁ jakkiliya dāriyiṁ paḍuva 1 mattaṁ Arasiya bā
viyiṁ mūḍa 1 Antu tōṁṭaveraḍu Īntī dharmmamaṁ pratipālisidavargge bāṇa
rāśi prayāge Arghyatīrthaṁ kurukṣētrameṁba tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ sāsirvvar ca
turvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarggaṁ sāsirvvarttapōdhanarggaṁ sāsirakavi
leya naḷaṁkārasahitaṁ koṭṭa puṇyamakku Ī dharmmama naḷidavargge vāraṇā
si kurukṣētradoḷ sāsirvvar caturvvēdapāragarappa bāhmaṇaruṁ sā
sirvvarttapōdhanaruṁ sāsiraliṁgamuṁ sāsirakavileyuma naḷida ma
hāpātakanakku . ślōka . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pā
lanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ prārtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yā
catē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ
ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . bahubhirvvasu
dhā bhuktā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ .
Ī sthānamappaḍe mōrakhaṇḍiya sthānaṁ modalāgi mahādēvarggaṁ molliya
ravaru biṭṭa tōṁṭa purvvada tōṁṭadiṁ baḍagalu 1 Aṁtu tōṁṭa muṟu 3
Digital edition of SII 11.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
